input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.4.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.4.1.2
            TITLE: the team and vehicle that illustrate the best use of engineering to meet the design goals, a

            CONTENT:
            rule S.4.1.2: The team and vehicle that illustrate the best use of engineering to meet the design goals, a
S.4.1.2 The team and vehicle that illustrate the best use of engineering to meet the design goals, a 
cost effective high performance vehicle, and the best understanding of the design by the team 
members will win the Design Event.

final_answer: The team and vehicle that illustrate the best use of engineering to meet the design goals, a cost effective high performance vehicle, and the best understanding of the design by the team members will win the Design Event.
